hooks.command: git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'INSIGHTS\.md' || echo '{"systemMessage": "[ INSIGHTS ] Session ended — did you update INSIGHTS.md?"}'

input=$(cat); prompt=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.prompt // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$prompt" | grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*/export[[:space:]]*$'; then mkdir -p docs/sessions; N=$(( $(ls docs/sessions/chat.* 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') + 1 )); NF=$(printf '%03d' $N); printf '{"systemMessage":"Use: /export docs/sessions/chat.%s.md","continue":false}' "$NF"; fi
